specSummary.overview: Saved Responses is a productivity feature for Coaches. It lets them save, manage, and quickly insert predefined messages in client chats. Feature is plan-gated (Pro and above) and list is private per user.

userStories.title: Save and quickly insert predefined responses in chats
userStories.goal: Respond faster and maintain consistency without retyping the same messages

userStories.title: Create a saved response from a message in the conversation
userStories.goal: Add new saved responses quicker from existing chat messages

acceptanceCriteria.title: Add Saved Response button in Editor nav
Saved Response popup — structure, sections, keyboard navigation, pagination
Bookmark button on Coach non-text messages
Add new saved response from conversation

keyFlows: Open popup → browse list → select → insert into chatbox
Create new saved response via popup form
Edit existing saved response (with discard-change guard)
Delete saved response via confirmation popup
Search saved responses by title or message
Save response directly from a Coach's non-text chat message

businessRules: Feature available on Pro plan and above only (workspace-level gate)
All Coaches in the workspace can use Saved Responses if workspace has permission
Saved Responses list is private per user — not shared across coaches
Usage count is per user; incremented each time a response is selected (appended to chatbox)
FREQUENTLY USED section: top 5 responses by usage_count descending; tie-break by title A-Z
FREQUENTLY USED section hidden if no responses have been used yet
ALL section sorted by title A-Z
Pagination: 20 items loaded initially; Load more on scroll fetches next 20
TITLE field: max 140 characters; paste truncates to first 140
MESSAGE field: max 10,000 characters; paste truncates to first 10,000; no text formatting allowed
Save button enabled only when both TITLE and MESSAGE fields have input
Edit popup: discard confirmation shown only when at least 1 change has been made
Bookmark button visible only on Coach's non-text messages on paid-plan workspaces
From conversation: popup title = 'Add To Saved Responses'; TITLE blank; MESSAGE pre-populated; toast = 'Response has been saved'
Selecting a saved response appends full message content behind existing chatbox text

testAreas.area: US2 — Bookmark Button on Chat Message
cases: Bookmark button appears between 3-dot and Reply for Coach non-text messages on hover
Tooltip shows 'Saved this response'
Bookmark button NOT shown on non-paid-plan workspace
Bookmark button NOT shown on client messages
Bookmark button NOT shown on text messages
Popup title is 'Add To Saved Responses'
TITLE field blank
MESSAGE field pre-populated with Coach message
Coach message > 10,000 chars truncated to 10,000 in MESSAGE field
Save adds response and shows 'Response has been saved' toast

edgeCases: Exactly 0 saved responses → empty state displayed
Exactly 1 to 4 responses with usage — FREQUENTLY USED shows all of them (< 5 threshold)
All 5+ responses with equal usage_count — tie-break applies A-Z
FREQUENTLY USED hidden when none of the responses have been used yet
TITLE paste input exactly 140 chars — no truncation; 141 chars — truncated
MESSAGE paste input exactly 10,000 chars — no truncation; 10,001 chars — truncated
MESSAGE paste with rich text formatting — formatting stripped
Coach message exactly 10,000 chars from conversation — no truncation in pre-populate
Coach message 10,001 chars from conversation — truncated to 10,000 in pre-populate
Search with 1 character that matches 0 responses
Search cleared → full list restored including FREQUENTLY USED / ALL sections
Edit popup: no changes made → X / Cancel closes directly without discard prompt
Edit popup: change made then reverted to original → unclear if discard guard triggers (ambiguity)
Selecting a response when chatbox already has text → message appended AFTER existing text
Pressing Enter on selected response with empty chatbox → message fills chatbox
Pagination: exactly 20 responses → no Load more shown; 21 responses → Load more shown after scroll
FREQUENTLY USED responses that are also in search results — behavior of sections during search not explicitly defined

ambiguities.quote: I hover over a non-text message of the Coach
ambiguities.issue: Spec does not enumerate what message types qualify as 'non-text'. Could include images, files, videos, audio, etc. Need to confirm which types trigger the bookmark button.
ambiguities.impact: High — affects scope of US2 testing

ambiguities.quote: On the left-side of the modal, show list of title's saved responses: Order by latest updated time. ALL section: List all saved responses, sort by title A-Z.
ambiguities.issue: There are two sort orders mentioned: 'order by latest updated time' (outer list) and 'sort by title A-Z' (ALL section). It is unclear if 'order by latest updated time' applies at a higher grouping level or is overridden by the section sort. The ALL section's A-Z sort seems to supersede for that section.
ambiguities.impact: Medium — affects ordering assertions in list tests

ambiguities.quote: Enable if having input in both TITLE & MESSAGE fields.
ambiguities.issue: Edit Save button spec says 'enable if having input in both fields' but does not explicitly state it disables when either field is cleared. Implied by parity with Create (AC5), but not explicitly stated.
ambiguities.impact: Low — implied behavior, but worth confirming

ambiguities.quote: If user has made at least 1 change, show the Discard change pop up
ambiguities.issue: If a user makes a change and then reverts it back to the original value, does the discard popup still appear? The spec does not clarify whether 'change' means current state differs from original, or any edit action was taken.
ambiguities.impact: Medium — edge case in edit guard behavior

ambiguities.quote: Show list of results same as AC2 above.
ambiguities.issue: When searching, does the FREQUENTLY USED section still appear within search results, or only the ALL section? The spec is not explicit about section behavior during active search.
ambiguities.impact: Medium — affects search result structure assertions

ambiguities.quote: Add a Saved Responses button next to GIF button.
ambiguities.issue: Position is unspecified — left or right of GIF button. This matters for UI layout assertions.

notes: context-digest.md was generated before spec was imported — shows 'no spec imported'. The spec is fully available in spec/imported-spec.md.
